name: Khenra Twins
description: If your twin is alive and you can see your twin, whenever you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. If your twin is dead (or if you were born without a twin), you can't be frightened.

mechanics.trigger: attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
mechanics.condition: twin is alive and you can see the twin
mechanics.effect: reroll the die and must use the new result

mechanics.condition_source: twin is dead or you have no twin
